One race doesn't define you. The ups and downs of racing? Leo's been through it all. He sees you at your lowest low, and never question for a second he will see you at the highest high.

Your team principal is an asshole, Ferrari is kind of a mess under his leadership... But don't worry, all you have to do is believe in yourself and leave everything else to Leo. Taking care of your need is a manager's job after all. The chapter in his life where he was winning one race after another has passed, and right now he only has one focus: you.

If you need comfort, that's what he'll give.
